problem: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage?
mechanism: Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus
hypothesis: If Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus is applied to without, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 24 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
